failures.description: The agent fabricated an item ID and price instead of using the cheapest item returned by the catalog search.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 listed 11 available electric kettles sorted by ascending price; the cheapest was item_id 1240311797 priced at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming item 0000000000 costs $0.01, which is absent from and contradicted by the tool result. This invented value was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
